# KMapGen

KMapGen is a Karnaugh Map Generator and Logic Gate Visualizer.

## Features
- Generates Karnaugh Maps (up to 4 variables).
- Minimizes boolean expressions (SOP and POS forms) using the Quine-McCluskey algorithm.
- Visualizes logic gate circuits in Basic Gates (AND/OR/NOT), NAND-only, and NOR-only configurations.
- Fully client-side; no data leaves the browser.
- PWA ready and fully offline-capable.

## Project URLs
- Production URL: https://kmapgen.nicx.dev/
- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/nicx17/kmapgen
- Author: Nick Cardoso (https://nickcardoso.com)

## Implementation Details
- Built with TypeScript and Vite.
- Does not use external UI frameworks (React, Vue, etc.), strictly Vanilla DOM APIs.
- Uses SVG for visualizing circuits and Karnaugh maps.
- Supports dark and light modes.
